paper_thesis: HS-JEPA core is a hidden human-state and listener-responsibility representation, not a standalone label classifier.  Its strongest evidence is masked context prediction, subject-invariant prototype grammar, subject-relative routine-break, cross-subject prototype transport, sleep-pressure, cohort-relative prediction, route-preserving multi-target human-state prediction, transported-prototype listener readout, learned/invariant/multi-head listener-responsibility pretext, label-free and learned listener-head routing, global-transport residual listener routing, rhythm-conditioned temporal decoding, and listener-conditioned route readout with subject-invariant listener/action-health separability.

cases.question: OG lifelog contextм—җм„ң л§Ңл“  human-state geometryк°Җ label/action кө¬мЎ°лҘј лҚ” мһҳ лӘЁмңјлҠ”к°Җ
cases.interpretation: м§Ғм ‘ label classifierлҠ” м•„лӢҲм§Җл§Ң, к°Җк№Ңмҡҙ rowк°Җ target manifoldлҘј лҚ” кіөмң н•ңлӢӨ.

cases.interpretation: JEPA contract мһҗмІҙлҠ” м„ұлҰҪн•ңлӢӨ. лӢЁ, direct label decoderлЎң м“°л©ҙ л§қк°Җм§„лӢӨ.

cases.question: label-free subject-relative world-stateк°Җ subject identityлҘј мӨ„мқҙкі  frozen label probeлҘј к°ңм„ н•ҳлҠ”к°Җ
cases.interpretation: absolute stateлҠ” subject identityлҘј к°•н•ҳкІҢ лӢҙм§Җл§Ң, subject-relative predicted stateлҠ” subject-id leakageлҘј кұ°мқҳ м ңкұ°н•ҳкі  low-trust frozen probeм—җм„ң priorлҘј м•„мЈј мһ‘кІҢ мқҙкёҙлӢӨ.

cases.question: subject-relative lifelog мўҢн‘ңм—җм„ң label-free episode prototype grammarлҘј мҳҲмёЎн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ”к°Җ
cases.interpretation: absolute lifelog лҢҖмӢ  subject-relative мўҢн‘ңм—җм„ң л§Ңл“  prototype grammarлҠ” masked prototype pretextм—җм„ң priorлҘј мқҙкё°кі , raw lifelogліҙлӢӨ subject leakageлҘј нҒ¬кІҢ мӨ„мқёлӢӨ. frozen probe нҡЁкіјлҠ” мһ‘м§Җл§Ң HS-JEPA coreк°Җ subject-invariant human-life episode grammarлҘј л§Ңл“Ө мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨлҠ” positive-boundary evidenceлӢӨ.

cases.question: train subjects/blocksк°Җ л§Ңл“  subject-relative episode grammarлҘј held-out subject/blockмңјлЎң мҡҙл°ҳн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ”к°Җ
cases.interpretation: prototype grammarлҘј full cohortм—җ л§һм¶ҳ кІғмқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј foldл§ҲлӢӨ train subjects/blocksм—җм„ңл§Ң м •мқҳн•ң л’Ө held-out subjectлЎң transportн–ҲлӢӨ. label-free pretextлҠ” priorлҘј мқҙкё°кі , transported stats+probabilities frozen probeлҠ” subject-heldout priorмҷҖ raw lifelog PCAліҙлӢӨ лӮ®мқҖ loglossлҘј ліҙмқёлӢӨ. лӢӨл§Ң probability-rich readoutмқҖ subject leakageк°Җ м»Өм§Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲм–ҙ stats-only/readout-riskлҘј л¶„лҰ¬н•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

cases.interpretation: label-free transported prototype grammarлҘј кі м •н•ң л’Ө targetлі„ listenerк°Җ мқҪмқ„ viewлҘј frozen probeлЎң м„ нғқн–ҲлӢӨ. listener-conditioned readoutмқҖ global transported grammarмҷҖ priorлҘј мқҙкё°л©°, selected routesмқҳ subject leakageлҠ” global all-view bundleліҙлӢӨ лӮ®лӢӨ. лӢЁ, route м„ нғқм—җлҠ” labelsк°Җ м“°мҳҖмңјлҜҖлЎң core pretextк°Җ м•„лӢҲлқј core-interface diagnosticмқҙлӢӨ.

cases.interpretation: same-subject future episodeмҷҖ cross-subject cohort consistencyлҘј hidden teacherм—җ л„Јм—ҲлӢӨ. future-only invariant responsibilityлҠ” current-relative responsibilityліҙлӢӨ subject-heldout downstreamмқҙ мўӢкі , row-block/chronological stressм—җм„ңлҠ” global transportліҙлӢӨлҸ„ мӮҙм•„лӮЁлҠ”лӢӨ. лӢӨл§Ң direct semanticкіј кұ°мқҳ лҸҷлҘ мқҙл©° subject-heldout global transportлҠ” м•„м§Ғ л„ҳм§Җ лӘ»н•ңлӢӨ. cohort-onlyлҠ” pretext/top1мқҖ к°•н•ҳм§Җл§Ң downstreamмқҖ м•Ҫн•ҙ, pretext accuracyмҷҖ downstream utilityк°Җ л¶„лҰ¬лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢмқ„ ліҙм—¬мӨҖлӢӨ.
